search.enterQueryDesc: Type at least 2 characters to start searching.

offline.title: Offline
offline.description: You are currently offline. Some features may not be available. Check your internet connection and try again.
offline.cachedHint: Previously viewed pages and data remain available.

pwa.installDescription: Quickly access your collections from your home screen.
pwa.updateDescription: A new version of SnowShelf is available.

explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle: Discover other users' collections
explore.noUsersDesc: No users have made their collection public yet.
explore.collectionPrivateDesc: This user has chosen to keep their collection private.
explore.noCategoriesDesc: This user doesn't have any categories yet.
explore.tryOtherFilters: Try different filters or modify your search.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's an overview of your collection

onboarding.step1Desc: Organize your collections by themes: video games, figurines, cards, vinyl records…
onboarding.step2Desc: Catalog each piece of your collection with details, prices and ratings.
onboarding.step3Desc: Take photos directly from the app or import them from your gallery.
onboarding.step4Desc: Find information about your items from 32 integrated data sources.
onboarding.step5Desc: Choose from 43 themes, change language and configure your notifications.

friends.title: Friends
friends.noFriendsDesc: Explore profiles and send friend requests.
friends.noReceivedRequestsDesc: You have no pending friend requests.
friends.noSentRequestsDesc: You haven't sent any friend requests.

byEmail.label: Add a friend by email
byEmail.hint: The email is never shared. If the user doesn't exist or refuses requests, the same message will appear to protect their privacy.
byEmail.alreadySent: A request is already pending for {{username}}
byEmail.notFound: No user found or this person does not accept friend requests
